positive: A stylized, minimal, and visually striking illustration of a fantastical forest landscape viewed from a top-down perspective. The main subject is a whimsical grouping of bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, curving roots forming a natural labyrinth. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern flat design, using strong, saturated jewel tones (deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples) contrasted with crisp white outlines and gold foil accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and suitable for repetition across fabric. Focus on clear, graphic silhouettes and bold negative space. Perfect for a central chest print.
